# Tollway — Full Documentation

Turnkey x402 monetization for SaaS APIs and MCP servers, settling on Stellar USDC.

---

## What it is

Tollway replaces subscription billing with per-request payments. Developers add one config file and one middleware call; Tollway handles pricing logic, free-tier quotas, payment challenges, verification, and analytics.

The x402 protocol lets any HTTP endpoint return a 402 Payment Required response with machine-readable payment instructions. An x402-aware client (human or AI agent) pays in USDC on Stellar and retries. Tollway is the opinionated layer that makes this practical for real APIs and MCP servers.

**Why Stellar:** ~$0.00001 transaction fees make micropayments work economically. The Built on Stellar facilitator (powered by OpenZeppelin Relayer + Channels) covers network fees entirely.

---

## Packages

| Package | npm | Description |
|---------|-----|-------------|
| `@tollway/express` | `npm install @tollway/express` | Express middleware |
| `@tollway/mcp` | `npm install @tollway/mcp` | MCP server wrapper |
| `@tollway/core` | (peer dep) | Config, pricing, quota, analytics |

Peer dependencies for Express: `@x402/core @x402/express @x402/stellar`
Peer dependency for MCP: `@modelcontextprotocol/sdk`

---

## Quickstart: Express API

```js
// 1. Install
// npm install @tollway/express @x402/core @x402/express @x402/stellar

// 2. tollway.config.js
export default {
  payTo: "G...your_stellar_address...",    // required: Stellar public key
  network: "stellar:testnet",              // or "stellar:pubnet"
  pricing: {
    "GET /api/search":    { price: "$0.002" },
    "POST /api/generate": { price: "$0.01"  },
    "GET /api/status":    "free",
  },
  freeTier: {
    enabled: true,
    requestsPerDay: 100,
    identifyBy: "ip",   // or "wallet"
  },
};

// 3. server.js
import express from "express";
import { tollway } from "@tollway/express";
import config from "./tollway.config.js";

const app = express();
app.use(express.json());
app.use(tollway(config));   // ← entire integration

app.get("/api/search", (req, res) => {
  // req.tollway tells you how the request was authorized:
  //   { paid: false, freeTier: true, remaining: 42 }  — free tier
  //   { paid: true, priceUsd: 0.002 }                 — paid
  res.json({ results: [] });
});
```

---

## Quickstart: MCP Server

```js
// npm install @tollway/mcp @modelcontextprotocol/sdk

import { TollwayMCP } from "@tollway/mcp";

const server = new TollwayMCP({
  payTo: "G...your_stellar_address...",
  network: "stellar:testnet",
});

server.freeTool("health", {
  description: "Health check",
  handler: async () => ({ status: "ok" }),
});

server.paidTool("search", {
  price: "$0.002",
  description: "Search the knowledge base",
  inputSchema: {
    type: "object",
    properties: { query: { type: "string" } },
    required: ["query"],
  },
  handler: async ({ query }) => {
    return { results: ["..."] };
  },
});

await server.start();  // connects stdio transport
```

---

## Config reference

### `payTo` (required)
Stellar public key starting with G, 56 characters. This address receives all USDC revenue.

```js
payTo: "GABC...XYZ"
```

### `network`
`"stellar:testnet"` (default) or `"stellar:pubnet"`. Controls which Stellar network payments settle on and which facilitator endpoint is used.

### `facilitatorUrl`
Override the x402 facilitator URL. Defaults:
- testnet: `https://channels.openzeppelin.com/testnet`
- pubnet: `https://channels.openzeppelin.com/mainnet`

### `pricing` (required)
Map of `"METHOD /path"` strings to pricing rules. Supports:

```js
pricing: {
  // Static price
  "GET /api/search": { price: "$0.002", description: "optional" },

  // Always free
  "GET /api/status": "free",

  // Dynamic — function receives the Express req object
  "POST /api/analyze": (req) => {
    return { price: req.body.depth === "deep" ? "$0.05" : "$0.01" };
  },

  // Wildcard — matches /api/users/anything
  "GET /api/users/*": { price: "$0.001" },

  // Parameterized — matches /api/items/123
  "GET /api/items/:id": { price: "$0.003" },
}
```

Route matching priority: exact match first, then pattern matching.
Unpriced routes (not in the map) always pass through without charge.

### `freeTier`
```js
freeTier: {
  enabled: true,
  requestsPerDay: 100,    // free requests before 402 kicks in
  identifyBy: "ip",       // "ip" | "wallet"
}
```
`identifyBy: "wallet"` uses the Stellar wallet address from the payment header (falls back to IP if no payment header present). `identifyBy: "ip"` uses the request IP address.

### `analytics`
```js
analytics: {
  enabled: true,
  logger: "console",        // "console" | false
  webhookUrl: "https://...", // optional: POST events to this URL
}
```
Events emitted: `request.free`, `request.paid`, `request.blocked`, `request.unpriced`, `payment.settled`, `payment.failed`.

---

## req.tollway context

After Tollway processes a request, it attaches context to `req.tollway`:

```js
// Free tier request
req.tollway = {
  paid: false,
  freeTier: true,
  remaining: 42,    // free requests remaining today
}

// Paid request (payment verified)
req.tollway = {
  paid: true,
  freeTier: false,
  priceUsd: 0.002,
  route: "GET /api/search",
}
```

For unpriced and free routes, `req.tollway` is not set.

---

## 402 response format

When payment is required, Tollway returns:

**Status:** `402 Payment Required`

**Header:** `X-Payment-Required` (JSON)

**Body:** (same JSON as header)

```json
{
  "x402Version": 1,
  "accepts": {
    "scheme": "exact",
    "price": "$0.002",
    "network": "stellar:testnet",
    "payTo": "G...your_address..."
  },
  "description": "Search the knowledge base",
  "resource": "GET /api/search"
}
```

An x402-enabled client reads this, signs a Soroban authorization entry for the specified USDC amount, and retries the request with a `payment-signature` header. Tollway verifies the signature via the facilitator and calls `next()` if valid.

---

## Payment flow (step by step)

```
Client                    Tollway Middleware              Stellar Network
  │                              │                               │
  │── GET /api/search ──────────>│                               │
  │                              │ resolve pricing               │
  │                              │ check free tier quota         │
  │                              │ quota exhausted               │
  │<── 402 + X-Payment-Required ─│                               │
  │                              │                               │
  │ [client signs Soroban auth]  │                               │
  │── GET /api/search ──────────>│                               │
  │   payment-signature: ...     │                               │
  │                              │── verify payment ────────────>│
  │                              │<── valid ─────────────────────│
  │                              │── next() ─────────────────────│
  │<── 200 OK ───────────────────│                               │
  │                              │── settle (async) ────────────>│
  │                              │   (~5s Stellar settlement)    │
```

---

## TollwayMCP API

```js
const server = new TollwayMCP(config);

// Register a free tool
server.freeTool(name, {
  description: string,
  inputSchema?: JSONSchema,      // defaults to { type: "object" }
  handler: async (params) => any,
});

// Register a paid tool
server.paidTool(name, {
  price: string | number,        // e.g. "$0.01" or 0.01
  description: string,
  inputSchema?: JSONSchema,
  handler: async (params) => any,
});

// Build and return the McpServer instance (without starting)
const mcpServer = await server.build();

// Build and start with stdio transport
await server.start();
```

A built-in `tollway_pricing` tool is automatically registered, listing all tools and their prices.

---

## Analytics events

Subscribe to analytics events programmatically:

```js
import { createAnalytics } from "@tollway/core";

const analytics = createAnalytics(config.analytics);

analytics.on("request.paid", ({ route, priceUsd, timestamp }) => {
  console.log(`Earned $${priceUsd} on ${route}`);
});

analytics.on("payment.settled", ({ route, txHash }) => {
  console.log(`Settled: ${txHash}`);
});
```

Or receive all events via webhook (POST with JSON body):

```js
analytics: {
  webhookUrl: "https://your-dashboard.example.com/events",
}
```

---

## Custom quota store (Redis, etc.)

The default quota store is in-memory. Swap it for Redis or any store that implements the adapter interface:

```js
import { createQuotaTracker } from "@tollway/core";

const redisStore = {
  async get(callerId, dayKey) {
    return parseInt(await redis.get(`quota:${callerId}:${dayKey}`)) || 0;
  },
  async increment(callerId, dayKey) {
    await redis.incr(`quota:${callerId}:${dayKey}`);
    await redis.expire(`quota:${callerId}:${dayKey}`, 86400);
  },
};

const quota = createQuotaTracker(config.freeTier, redisStore);
```

---

## Environment variables

```bash
STELLAR_PAY_TO=G...     # your Stellar public key
STELLAR_NETWORK=stellar:testnet   # or stellar:pubnet
PORT=3001
```

---

## Running tests

```bash
npm test                  # run all workspace tests
npm run demo              # interactive CLI demo
node demo/index.js        # same as above
```

---

## Repository structure

```
tollway/
  packages/
    core/           @tollway/core — config, pricing, quota, analytics
    express/        @tollway/express — Express middleware
    mcp/            @tollway/mcp — MCP server wrapper
  examples/
    basic-api/      Express API example
    basic-mcp/      MCP server example
  demo/             Interactive CLI demo
  CHANGELOG.md
  README.md
  llms.txt
```
